metadata.description: Private marketplace for logan's Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: global-plugin-dev
plugins.description: Dev/staging build of global-plugin pinned to the dev branch — for pre-promotion testing only.

plugins.name: board
plugins.description: Anti-staleness governance for Claude-Code-driven planning under BOARD/plans/. Hooks enforce frontmatter, splitting rules, and locked-leaf immutability; /board:* commands scaffold initiatives, author and lock SPEC/PLAN leaves, query <board-*> tag blocks, and promote ADRs to docs/ADRS.md.
